description_long: This triumphal arch is a monumental structure with a large central archway, flanked by two robust piers. The front face features two sculpted human figures standing on pedestals at the base of each pier, and a prominent decorative relief of a winged figure above the arch. The structure is solid and imposing, with a flat entablature crowning the top. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the depth and thickness of the arch. The rear face is simple, lacking the sculptural details present on the front, and the entire structure appears to be constructed from dark stone or concrete with lighter stone used for the sculptures.
description: A monumental triumphal arch with sculpted figures and a winged relief on the front, made of dark stone with a large central archway.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sculpted figures at the base and a winged relief above the arch.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and thickness of the arch, with no visible decorative elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain surface with the central archway, lacking sculptures or reliefs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid profile of the structure.
